extortion.description: ibL – Ingenieurbüro für Landentwicklung GmbH – based in Halle (Saale) is a consulting and planning engineering firm that operates primarily in rural areas. Our work focuses on planning services for land development using geodata. In selected regions, we act as a suitable agency for determining and reorganizing the ownership of land and buildings based on Section 99 (2) of the Land Consolidation Act and Section 53 of the Agricultural Adjustment Act.  ===> Phone Number: 0345 233 410 Revenue: $5 Million Industry: Engineering Employees: 25 Data: 56gb
